rows.snippet: 2 weeks ago - # Hybrid query (recommended default) curl -X POST http://localhost:9623/query \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{ "query": "What infrastructure decisions were made and why?", "mode": "hybrid", "only_need_context": false }' # Local mode — specific entity facts curl -X POST http://localhost:9623/query \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{ "query": "Tell me about the 5090 PC setup", "mode": "local" }' # Global mode — relationship discovery curl -X POST http://localhost:9623/query \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{ "query": "How do the different projects relate to each other?", "mode": "global" }'
